info.title: Order - bg.order.list.v2.get
info.description: The bg.order.list.v2.get interface is designed for support batch return of corresponding order lists based on filtering criteria.

post.summary: The bg.order.list.v2.get interface is designed for support batch return of corresponding order lists based on filtering criteria.
post.description: The bg.order.list.v2.get interface is designed for support batch return of corresponding order lists based on filtering criteria.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `bg.order.list.v2.get`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: pageNumber
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: pageSize
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Page size for pagination, default is 10, max is 100.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: parentOrderStatus
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Parent order status, default is to query all. Enum values: 0 :All, 1 :PENDING, Pending status 2 :UN_SHIPPING, Awaiting shipment 3 :CANCELED, Order canceled, 4 :SHIPPED, Order shipped, 5 : RECEIPTED, Order received 41: Partially shipped(only for local mall), 51 :Partially received(only for local mall).

x-temu-request-parameters.name: parentOrderSnList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: List of parent order numbers, max 20 per request.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: createAfter
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Start time for querying parent order creation, in seconds(timestamp). Defines the starting range of the creation time when querying parent orders. -Must be used in conjunction with createBefore.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: createBefore
x-temu-request-parameters.description: End time for querying parent order creation, in seconds(timestamp). Defines the ending range (closed interval) of the creation time when querying parent orders. -Must be used in conjunction with createAfter.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: expectShipLatestTimeStart
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Start time for querying expected latest shipment, in seconds.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: expectShipLatestTimeEnd
x-temu-request-parameters.description: End time for querying expected latest shipment, in seconds.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: updateAtStart
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Start time for querying order update, in seconds(timestamp). Defines the starting range of the status change time when querying parent orders. -Must be used in conjunction with updateAtEnd.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: updateAtEnd
x-temu-request-parameters.description: End time for querying order update, in seconds(timestamp). Defines the ending range (closed interval) of the status change time when querying parent orders. -Must be used in conjunction with updateAtStart.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: parentConfirmTimeStart
x-temu-request-parameters.description: - Query the confirmed start time of the parentorder, with the input parameter in seconds (timestamp) - Define the starting range for the final confirmation time when querying the parentorder - Must be used together with parentConfirmTimeEnd

x-temu-request-parameters.name: parentConfirmTimeEnd
x-temu-request-parameters.description: -Query the confirmation end time of the parentorder in seconds (timestamp) as a parameter -Define the end range of confirmation time when querying parentorder -Must be used together with parentConfirmTimeStart

x-temu-request-parameters.name: fulfillmentTypeList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: the type of order fulfillment.enum values: fulfillBySeller :fulfill by seller, fulfillByCooperativeWarehouse : fulfill by CooperativeWarehouse.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: parentOrderLabel
x-temu-request-parameters.description: List of PO order status labels: soon_to_be_overdue past_due pending_buyer_cancellation pending_buyer_address_change pending_risk_control_alert signature_required_on_delivery

x-temu-request-parameters.name: sortby
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Sort by, output in reverse order. By default, the order creation time is used. The corresponding enumeration is:updateTime,createTime.

rows.Error Message: parentConfirmTimeEnd needs to be greater than the parentConfirmTimeStart
The format of {*} is inaccurate and requires a second level timestamp
This interface does not support cross-border sellers. Please check whether the store bound to the token is a SEMI or LOCAL store!

rows.Permission Package: Semi Seller in House System Management

type.description: API name,eg:bg.* Must be `bg.order.list.v2.get` for this operation.

access_token.description: A secure token for access control.

timestamp.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

data_type.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

version.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

pageNumber.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1.

pageSize.description: Page size for pagination, default is 10, max is 100.

parentOrderStatus.description: Parent order status, default is to query all. Enum values: 0 :All, 1 :PENDING, Pending status 2 :UN_SHIPPING, Awaiting shipment 3 :CANCELED, Order canceled, 4 :SHIPPED, Order shipped, 5 : RECEIPTED, Order received 41: Partially shipped(only for local mall), 51 :Partially received(only for local mall).

parentOrderSnList.description: List of parent order numbers, max 20 per request.

createAfter.description: Start time for querying parent order creation, in seconds(timestamp). Defines the starting range of the creation time when querying parent orders. -Must be used in conjunction with createBefore.

createBefore.description: End time for querying parent order creation, in seconds(timestamp). Defines the ending range (closed interval) of the creation time when querying parent orders. -Must be used in conjunction with createAfter.

expectShipLatestTimeStart.description: Start time for querying expected latest shipment, in seconds.

expectShipLatestTimeEnd.description: End time for querying expected latest shipment, in seconds.

updateAtStart.description: Start time for querying order update, in seconds(timestamp). Defines the starting range of the status change time when querying parent orders. -Must be used in conjunction with updateAtEnd.

updateAtEnd.description: End time for querying order update, in seconds(timestamp). Defines the ending range (closed interval) of the status change time when querying parent orders. -Must be used in conjunction with updateAtStart.

parentConfirmTimeStart.description: - Query the confirmed start time of the parentorder, with the input parameter in seconds (timestamp) - Define the starting range for the final confirmation time when querying the parentorder - Must be used together with parentConfirmTimeEnd

parentConfirmTimeEnd.description: -Query the confirmation end time of the parentorder in seconds (timestamp) as a parameter -Define the end range of confirmation time when querying parentorder -Must be used together with parentConfirmTimeStart

fulfillmentTypeList.description: the type of order fulfillment.enum values: fulfillBySeller :fulfill by seller, fulfillByCooperativeWarehouse : fulfill by CooperativeWarehouse.

parentOrderLabel.description: List of PO order status labels: soon_to_be_overdue past_due pending_buyer_cancellation pending_buyer_address_change pending_risk_control_alert signature_required_on_delivery

sortby.description: Sort by, output in reverse order. By default, the order creation time is used. The corresponding enumeration is:updateTime,createTime.
